Careers
At Nīewe Consulting (formerly Baiame), our outstanding work is a testament to our outstanding teams. We are always looking for energetic, engaged and talented individuals on a project-by-project or more permanent basis, no matter your experience level. 
If you think Nīewe sounds like the type of place you want to work, please contact us here.
About Us
Nīewe Consulting is a different kind of firm… and we are a different kind of people who want a different work experience than those offered by traditional consulting firms.  Nīewe (rhymes with view) – formally known as a Baiame Consulting – is a young and growing firm – and even those of us who are a little long in the tooth are young at heart!
Our leaders have been with the big firms, and we are doing our best to create something different…Together, we asked the question of what a truly different company would look like. We found that we could apply a “kitchen table” approach whereby the team gathers collaboratively when needed but isn’t bound by work location or hours. We have created an environment that encourages staff to work when they are the most productive so that they can best serve their clients.
